top_signals.title: Trump says he paused attack on Iran as negotiations continue
top_signals.summary: An Iranian source said the U.S. may agree to release some of Tehran's frozen funds and show more flexibility toward peaceful nuclear activity under supervision of the IAEA.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

alerts.title: Trump says he paused attack on Iran as negotiations continue
alerts.summary: An Iranian source said the U.S. may agree to release some of Tehran's frozen funds and show more flexibility toward peaceful nuclear activity under supervision of the IAEA.
alerts.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
